name: rag_index
description: Index the remediation knowledge base into the pgvector vectorDB: chunk the KB, then fan out LLM_INDEX_TEXT (OpenAI embeddings) per chunk. Run once after enabling RAG.

inputParameters.queryExpression: . as $in | ($in.chunks // []) | to_entries | { forkTasks: map({name: ("idx_" + (.key|tostring)), taskReferenceName: ("idx_" + (.key|tostring)), type: "LLM_INDEX_TEXT"}), forkTasksInputs: (map({key: ("idx_" + (.key|tostring)), value: {vectorDB: $in.vectorDB, namespace: $in.namespace, index: $in.index, embeddingModelProvider: $in.provider, embeddingModel: $in.model, text: .value.text, docId: .value.docId, metadata: .value.metadata}}) | from_entries), count: length }
